prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a clean anime-themed iPhone onboarding screen for WakeSaga. Anchor screen 1: Cold open. The app introduces the promise that tomorrow morning becomes Episode 001.
Required readable UI text only: "WakeSaga", "Tomorrow becomes Episode 001", "Turn your alarm into the start of your training arc", "Build My Opening".
Visual language: native iPhone onboarding, warm off-white background, large black typography, coral CTA, subtle gold/cyan accents, one original anime sunrise protagonist illustration, calm but cinematic. Lots of whitespace.
Composition/framing: tall iPhone screen with safe area, minimal top brand, large hero illustration, one headline, one short subhead, one sticky bottom CTA. Max 3 main UI zones.
Constraints: no dense manga collage, no tiny labels, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime character, no existing anime franchise references, no fake metrics, no RPG HUD, no generic neon AI gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a clean anime-themed iPhone onboarding screen for WakeSaga. Anchor screen 2: Morning enemy diagnosis. The user chooses what beats them after the alarm.
Required readable UI text only: "What beats you after the alarm?", "Warm bed", "Phone spiral", "Low mood", "Late panic", "Next".
Visual language: friendly iPhone quiz UI, soft cream background, large rounded choice cards, black typography, coral selected state, cyan/gold icons, small original anime rival sticker or avatar, light manga accent marks only.
Composition/framing: progress indicator at top, big question, four large tap cards in a clean 2x2 or vertical layout, bottom CTA. Max 4 main UI zones. Clear 44pt+ touch targets.
Constraints: no dense quiz wall, no tiny badges, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no random stats, no fake social proof, no RPG HUD, no generic purple AI gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a clean anime-themed iPhone onboarding education screen for WakeSaga. Anchor screen 3: Teach the Saga Loop.
Required readable UI text only: "The Saga Loop", "Alarm", "Wake Gate", "Morning Episode", "Move before your brain negotiates", "Continue".
Visual language: native iPhone education screen, minimal 3-step diagram, soft cream cards, black type, coral/cyan/gold step icons, one small original anime mentor illustration, subtle manga panel border around the diagram.
Composition/framing: progress at top, concise title, three large horizontal or vertical step cards, one short explanatory line, sticky CTA. Max 4 main UI zones, generous whitespace.
Constraints: no paragraph-heavy screen, no dense infographic, no tiny labels, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime character, no fake metrics, no RPG HUD, no generic neon AI gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a clean anime-themed iPhone onboarding screen for WakeSaga. Anchor screen 4: Choose tomorrow's arc.
Required readable UI text only: "Choose your arc", "Study", "Gym", "Deep Work", "Comeback", "Monk Mode", "Recovery", "Next".
Visual language: modern iPhone selection UI, warm off-white background, large rounded arc cards, simple anime crest/icon art, black typography, coral selected border, cyan/gold accents, minimal shadows.
Composition/framing: top progress, large title, six tappable cards in a clean two-column grid, bottom CTA. Each card should be spacious and readable. Max 4 main UI zones.
Constraints: no tiny card grid, no crowded collectible board, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no fake scores, no fake metrics, no RPG HUD, no generic purple AI gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a clean anime-themed iPhone onboarding screen for WakeSaga. Anchor screen 5: Choose the wake-up action gate.
Required readable UI text only: "Choose your Wake Gate", "Stand up", "Drink water", "Desk photo", "Shoes on", "Sunlight", "Spoken vow", "Next".
Visual language: native iPhone setup UI, large rounded action cards, simple icons, soft cream surface, black typography, coral selected state, cyan/gold small accents, one small anime guide bubble.
Composition/framing: top progress, one question, six spacious option cards, selected state visible, sticky bottom CTA. Max 4 main UI zones. Clean spacing and big touch targets.
Constraints: no dense Wayk clone, no tiny labels, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime characters, no fake metrics, no random stats, no RPG HUD, no generic neon gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a clean anime-themed iPhone onboarding result screen for WakeSaga. Anchor screen 6: Tomorrow's opening scene plan reveal after setup.
Required readable UI text only: "Your Opening Scene", "6:45 AM", "Wake Gate", "Stand up + water", "Narrator", "Mentor", "Mission", "Hard thing before noon", "Start Tomorrow".
Visual language: polished iPhone result screen, one beautiful anime sunrise card, clean plan summary cards, warm off-white background, black type, coral CTA, cyan/gold accents, screenshot-able but not cluttered.
Composition/framing: safe-area top, title, large plan card with anime image, three compact summary rows, bottom CTA. Max 4 main UI zones. Large readable text and generous whitespace.
Constraints: no dense receipt with tiny labels, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no fake stats, no fake social proof, no RPG HUD, no generic purple AI gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.
